datasets.descricao: Arquivo bruto do boletim de urna com votos por secao eleitoral, urna e cargo.

cobertura_temporal.notes: Coverage depends on TSE open-data availability by election.

cobertura_geografica.notes: National; SP is the primary product scope.

datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Download by election year and UF; preserve original zip hash in bronze manifest.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact join by ANO_ELEICAO, SIGLA_UF, COD_MUN_TSE, ZONA and SECAO after TSE code normalization.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Foundation for electoral strength and section-level territorial precision.
perguntas_respondidas: Where did the candidate perform by section?
Which sections show competitive pressure?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Critical source for electoral base strength.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.
Primary key must be unique inside the declared coverage and partition.
Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.lineage_notes: Raw evidence retained before any aggregation.

datasets.descricao: Resultados limpos e harmonizados por candidato, cargo, municipio, zona e secao.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Reprocess idempotently from bronze when TSE releases corrected files.
datasets.observacoes_join: Requires crosswalk for COD_MUN_TSE to COD_MUN_IBGE when enriching with IBGE sources.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Canonical source for candidate performance, ranking and competitive analysis.
perguntas_respondidas: What is the candidate base by section?
Where is expansion plausible?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Input for base strength, retention and competition scores.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Perfil agregado de eleitorado por secao com faixa etaria, genero e escolaridade.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Refresh every election cycle and validate only aggregated demographic buckets.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact by TSE territorial keys; never join to individual voter records.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Adds aggregated electorate context without individual microtargeting.
perguntas_respondidas: Which sections have relevant aggregate demographic context?
Where should messages be localized?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Allowed only as aggregated territorial signal.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.
Primary key must be unique inside the declared coverage and partition.
Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Locais de votacao, secoes associadas, endereco e eleitorado agregado.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Refresh by election year; preserve geocoding confidence as a data quality metric.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact on TSE keys; approximate geospatial join to census sectors must retain confidence flag.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Supports operational planning by physical voting place and section cluster.
perguntas_respondidas: Where are the high-impact voting places?
What local operation is feasible by zone?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Core for field operations and logistics.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

datasets.descricao: Candidate registration attributes needed for CandidateProfile and election context.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Refresh every election cycle; expose only fields needed for candidate context.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact by SQ_CANDIDATO; personal fields must be minimized and masked in logs.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Initial structured profile for candidate context and eligibility filters.
perguntas_respondidas: Who is the candidate?
Which race, party and territorial origin define the context?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.
Primary key must be unique inside the declared coverage and partition.
Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Campaign revenue and expenses aggregated by candidate and declared geography where available.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Refresh during and after campaign reporting windows; reconcile corrected filings.
datasets.observacoes_join: Territorial attribution is partial because many expenses are not declared at section/zone level.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Supports spend efficiency and estimated cost-per-vote analysis.
perguntas_respondidas: How expensive was the campaign performance?
Where are spend signals weak or missing?
lacunas_conhecidas: Many expenses lack reliable municipal or zone attribution.
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Use as aggregate efficiency signal, not deterministic local spend.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.
Primary key must be unique inside the declared coverage and partition.
Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

lacunas: Territorial allocation of expenses may require modeling assumptions.

datasets.descricao: Raw geospatial census-sector boundaries for territorial joins and spatial enrichment.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Version by census year; retain original geometry and checksum.
datasets.observacoes_join: Municipality joins are exact; voting-place to sector joins are geospatial and must be flagged.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Enables high-granularity territorial context around voting places.
perguntas_respondidas: Which census sectors surround priority voting places?
Where do territorial constraints affect operations?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

datasets.descricao: Aggregated census indicators by sector for income, households, age and education proxies.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Snapshot by census release; normalize indicators into controlled thematic dictionary.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact by CD_SETOR when sector is available; otherwise aggregate to municipality.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Creates territorial theme signals and socioeconomic context for recommendations.
perguntas_respondidas: Which themes are territorially relevant?
Where does socioeconomic context support a message?

datasets.descricao: Education infrastructure and enrollment indicators aggregated by municipality.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Annual ingestion with municipal aggregation and indicator dictionary.
datasets.observacoes_join: Join to electoral data through TSE-IBGE municipal crosswalk.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Supports education theme prioritization and local operational context.
perguntas_respondidas: Where is education a strong territorial theme?

datasets.descricao: Health facilities and capacity indicators aggregated by municipality.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Monthly incremental load by UF and year/month.
datasets.observacoes_join: Join through COD_MUN_IBGE after municipal crosswalk.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Supports health theme and public-service capacity context.

datasets.descricao: Municipal fiscal and budget indicators from Siconfi.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Annual load after fiscal publication; retain account taxonomy version.
datasets.observacoes_join: Municipal join only; no section-level precision without allocation model.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Adds fiscal context for operational feasibility and local public-service themes.
perguntas_respondidas: Which municipalities show fiscal constraints or capacity?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Public security indicators aggregated by municipality in Sao Paulo.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Monthly ingestion and dictionary mapping of crime categories.
datasets.observacoes_join: SP-only dataset; must be excluded from national runs unless coverage flag is SP.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Supports security theme analysis for SP campaigns.
perguntas_respondidas: Where is public security a relevant territorial theme?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Canonical crosswalk between TSE municipality codes, IBGE municipality codes and normalized names.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Rebuild when electoral or IBGE municipal codes change; persist ambiguity report.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact when both codes exist; name-based fallback must record match confidence and ambiguity.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Prevents unreliable joins between electoral and socioeconomic data.
perguntas_respondidas: Can electoral and IBGE datasets be joined safely?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Public social media handles declared by candidates to electoral authorities.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Refresh from candidate registration datasets and keep only declared public URLs.
datasets.observacoes_join: Exact by SQ_CANDIDATO; do not enrich with follower-level personal data.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Complements candidate context with declared public communication channels.
perguntas_respondidas: Which public channels are officially declared by the candidate?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Public political ad metadata, spend ranges and impression ranges from Meta Ad Library.

cobertura_geografica.notes: Political ads API coverage depends on platform availability.

datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Daily incremental API load with query audit and spend-range normalization.
datasets.observacoes_join: Candidate/page matching is probabilistic and requires manual review or declared-page evidence.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Adds paid media context and channel efficiency when public evidence is reliable.
perguntas_respondidas: Which messages and channels are visible in paid media?
Where is competitor spend visible?
lacunas_conhecidas: Spend is often a range and territory attribution can be incomplete.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.
Primary key must be unique inside the declared coverage and partition.
Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

lacunas: Requires platform access and policy-compliant collection strategy.

datasets.descricao: Aggregated public digital trend and competitive signals by theme and territory.

cobertura_geografica.notes: Coverage depends on source sample thresholds.

datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Weekly load only for aggregate public signals; require source confidence scoring.
datasets.observacoes_join: Use as weak signal only; never infer individual preference or voter-level behavior.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Adds exploratory theme demand signals where public aggregate coverage is sufficient.
perguntas_respondidas: Which themes show public aggregate attention by territory?
lacunas_conhecidas: Source sampling and API limits can bias small territories.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

lacunas: Needs governance review before commercial use.

datasets.descricao: Gold fact table joining electoral, territorial, census and location signals by section/zone/municipality.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Rebuild after any upstream TSE/IBGE source changes; persist join-confidence columns.
datasets.observacoes_join: Uses exact TSE joins and crosswalk-mediated IBGE joins; geospatial sector joins remain approximate.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Canonical analytical table for territorial ranking, maps and score generation.
perguntas_respondidas: What data exists for each section?
What confidence should be attached to each territorial join?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Primary governed fact table for decision intelligence.

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Gold score table with base strength, expansion, competition, cost efficiency and operational capacity.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Recompute after ingestion updates or strategy-weight configuration changes.
datasets.observacoes_join: Consumes governed gold fact and candidate context; output must retain component-level explanations.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Turns data assets into decision-oriented territory scores.
perguntas_respondidas: Which territories deserve priority?
Why is a territory high or low priority?

quality_rules.description: All required analytical columns must be present before promotion.

Dataset must be refreshed according to its declared periodicity or marked stale.

datasets.descricao: Allocation recommendations with suggested action, budget share, confidence and evidence links.
datasets.estrategia_atualizacao: Generated per scenario; version every recommendation run with evidence manifest.
datasets.observacoes_join: Serving output must link back to score run and evidence records; not a raw data source.

business_metadata.finalidade_produto: Commercial decision artifact for budget allocation and executive reporting.
perguntas_respondidas: Where should campaign resources go?
What is the evidence behind each recommendation?
business_metadata.documentacao_negocio: Serving contract for API, Streamlit UI and client reports.
